title: JohnTNT's Vanilla Enhanced
description: JohnTNT's Vanilla Enhanced, brings a semi-lightweight modpack, with a ton of QOL.
body:
TNT's Optimization Pack, offers massive FPS boosts thanks to Sodium and Lithium. This pack also includes many QOL features such as:
- Better F3 
- Better Stats
- and Cubes without Borders
- Controllerify
- and Audio Controller
- Along with fun stuff such as the Simple Voice Chat, AudioPlayer mod, and Zoomify, 

Making this a great pack to play some vanilla with friends
